skinsNotFound.title: No skins found
skinsNotFound.description: Nothing matched your search. Try clearing the filters or changing your search query.

colorSchemesNotFound.description: Nothing matched your search. Try clearing the filters or changing your search query.

skinNotFound.title: Skin not found
skinNotFound.description: The requested skin doesn't exist or has been removed. Go back to search and try again.

noWishlists.title: No wishlists yet
noWishlists.description: You don't have any wishlists yet. Create your first one to start saving your favorite skins.

guestWishlistNotFound.description: The wishlist at this link doesn't exist or has been removed. Try searching for other wishlists.

wishlistNoSkins.title: No skins in wishlist

wishlistNoColorSchemes.title: No color schemes in wishlist
wishlistNoColorSchemes.description: This wishlist is empty. Find color schemes you like and add them here.

wishlistsSearchNotFound.title: No wishlists found
wishlistsSearchNotFound.description: No wishlists matched your search. Try changing or clearing your search query.

collectionNoSkins.title: No skins in collection

collectionNoColorSchemes.title: No color schemes in collection

statsEmpty.title: Nothing to show yet

subscribedWishlistsNotFound.title: No wishlists followed
subscribedWishlistsNotFound.description: You haven't followed any wishlists yet. Browse wishlists and follow the ones you like.
